targetSenders().details: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

invariant_armConservation().notice: ARM token conservation: locker + actors + deployer = 100M

invariant_armTotalSupplyConstant().notice: ARM token total supply never changes from 100M

invariant_oneVotePerAddress().notice: Every recorded vote is reflected in the governor's hasVoted mapping

invariant_proposalStateMonotonic().notice: No proposal state ever went backward

invariant_totalLockedConsistency().notice: totalLocked matches sum of all individual locked balances
